subcodes.first_line: O scion of the glorious martyr! Though for some time I have been far and separated from meeting with you, yet when I call to mind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سلیل الشهید الجلیل هر چند مدتیست که از ملاقات شما دور و مهجورم ولی چون بیاد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @poems and quotation from poetry
